birds.evidence: |title=Rock wren Pīwauwau |url=http://www.nzbirdsonline.org.nz/species/rock-wren |website=New Zealand Birds Online}} of the Southern Alps, the Tasman Mountains of Northwest Nelson, and the Victoria Range of Westland, all in the South Island; it is New Zealand's only truly alpine bird. Subfossil remains suggest before Polynesian settlement it was also found in lowland forest
